coordinate_frame.name: HRA Visible Human Female common frame

sampling.radius_rule: outermost positive ray hit across selected surface triangles
sampling.section_center_rule: Deterministic 31x31 even/odd grid search; choose the inside point with maximum clearance from section segments, falling back to the X-Z AABB center.
sampling.silhouette_guards: The 0, 12, 24, and 36 samples retain each plane's exact +X, +Z, -X, and -Z extrema; missing non-star-shaped rays are circularly interpolated and clipped to the plane bounds.
